subject: Daylight_v0.6
claim_policy: do not claim or push a 1000 checkpoint until every claim gate below is satisfied by linked evidence

claim_gates.name: score_exactly_1000
claim_gates.evidence_needed: Daylight_v0.6_research_score = 1000 / 1000 in the Markdown and machine-readable scorecards.

claim_gates.name: integrated_public_authority
claim_gates.evidence_needed: Certificate, revocation, transparency-log, install, witness, publish, and trust-authority predicates are integrated instead of externally supplied.

claim_gates.name: mechanized_or_independently_reviewed_formal_model
claim_gates.evidence_needed: The Z3-backed M4 proof covers the current confidentiality, authorization, downgrade-resistance, and fail-closed predicate obligations; external formal-methods review remains useful but is not counted as tracked external review.

claim_gates.name: two_independent_external_reviews
claim_gates.evidence_needed: At least two independent external reviews are complete, tracked, signed or otherwise attributable, and all production-blocking findings are addressed.

claim_gates.name: production_authority
claim_gates.evidence_needed: Non-fixture production authority, publish authority, and trust authority are assembly-enforced and verified by signed ceremony evidence.

non_claims: this preflight is not an external review
this preflight is not production authority
this preflight is not a mechanized proof
this preflight does not raise the Daylight score
this preflight does not authorize pushing a 1000 checkpoint
